user.title: Home Energy Advisor
user.description: Choose the household energy inputs. Solar and battery are optional — without them, cost is calculated from grid import alone.

data_description.price_entity: The sensor giving the current import price per kWh.
data_description.currency: Currency for the cost sensors, e.g. EUR.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Cumulative energy imported from the grid.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Cumulative energy exported to the grid; used to work out self-consumed solar.
data_description.solar_entity: Cumulative solar generation. Leave empty if you have no solar.
data_description.battery_charge_entity: Cumulative energy charged into the battery.
data_description.battery_discharge_entity: Cumulative energy discharged from the battery.
data_description.house_consumption_entity: Total household consumption, if measured directly.

reconfigure.title: Edit Home Energy Advisor
reconfigure.description: Update the household energy inputs. Solar and battery remain optional.

data_description.price_entity: The sensor giving the current import price per kWh.
data_description.currency: Currency for the cost sensors, e.g. EUR.
data_description.grid_import_entity: Cumulative energy imported from the grid.
data_description.grid_export_entity: Cumulative energy exported to the grid; used to work out self-consumed solar.
data_description.solar_entity: Cumulative solar generation. Leave empty if you have no solar.
data_description.battery_charge_entity: Cumulative energy charged into the battery.
data_description.battery_discharge_entity: Cumulative energy discharged from the battery.
data_description.house_consumption_entity: Total household consumption, if measured directly.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Home Energy Advisor is already configured; only one instance is needed.

init.title: Cycle totals
init.description: Choose which longer-period totals to create for every device. Daily and monthly totals are always created.

user.title: Add a tracked device
user.description: Name the device and choose the one sensor that measures it — an energy counter, or a power sensor.

data_description.name: How this device appears in Home Assistant.
data_description.energy_entity: A cumulative energy sensor for this device.
data_description.power_entity: A power sensor; its energy is derived automatically.

reconfigure.title: Edit device
reconfigure.description: Change the device name or the sensor that measures it.

data_description.name: How this device appears in Home Assistant.
data_description.energy_entity: A cumulative energy sensor for this device.
data_description.power_entity: A power sensor; its energy is derived automatically.

error.select_one_sensor: Choose exactly one: an energy sensor or a power sensor, not both.

source_removed.title: An energy input is no longer available
source_removed.description: Home Energy Advisor can no longer find `{entity_id}`, which it needs for cost accounting — the entity may have been deleted or renamed. Edit the integration (or the device) to select the sensor again, so your figures stay accurate.

source_unavailable.title: An energy input has been unavailable for over an hour
source_unavailable.description: `{entity_id}` has been unavailable for more than an hour. Home Energy Advisor keeps accounting, but the energy and cost it would have measured while the sensor was down are missing. Check the device or integration that provides `{entity_id}`.

price_unavailable.title: The import price has been unavailable for over an hour
price_unavailable.description: The price sensor `{entity_id}` has been unavailable for more than an hour. Home Energy Advisor keeps pricing energy at the last price it saw, so costs during this period may be inaccurate. Check the tariff integration that provides the price.

helper_recreated.title: A required helper was re-created
helper_recreated.description: Home Energy Advisor re-created a helper it needs to measure the energy of “{name}”. This helper is created automatically and “{name}” cannot be costed without it, so if you deleted it on purpose, remove the device from Home Energy Advisor instead.

cycle_helper_recreated.title: One or more cycle-total helpers were re-created
cycle_helper_recreated.description: Home Energy Advisor re-created one or more daily, monthly or longer-cycle total helpers that had been deleted. These provide the per-period totals; to stop creating a longer cycle, turn it off in the integration options rather than deleting its helpers.

negative_remainder.title: Tracked devices are drawing more than the house consumes
negative_remainder.description: For over an hour, the energy attributed to your tracked devices has exceeded the household total. This usually means a device sensor is double-counted, or a house-level input is wrong. The Untracked figure is held at zero so costs still add up, but check your device and house-level sensor selections.
